# Models and pricing

Some intro text.

### Auto pricing

| Rate | Price per 1M tokens |
| :--- | :--- |
| Input & cache write | $1.25 |
| Cache read | $0.25 |
| Output | $6.00 |

| Claude 4.5 Haiku | 200k | $1.00 | $1.25 | $0.10 | $5.00 |
| GPT-5.2 | 400k | $1.75 | - | $0.18 | $14.00 |
